sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47488" key="h)pio/lhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἠπιόλης</orth> and <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡπ-</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n47488.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἠπιάλης</ref> </xr> and <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡπίολος</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
